title: machaeranthera carnosa var. intricata
intro: Machaeranthera carnosa var. intricata, also known as intricata greenthread or intricata threadleaf, is a variety of the Machaeranthera carnosa plant, a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Machaeranthera carnosa var. intricata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and wound-healing properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments to utilize its medicinal properties.
